programmes.show_description: The Gold Retrievers chase off a late-night intruder. Shane and Russell venture out on a new expedition, while the Poseidon Crew make a big decision. S7, Ep2
Lightning On The Open Seas. Jeff and Laura go fishing but are caught in a big electrical storm on the open water. Plus, the conditions lead to the island claiming its first victim. S4, Ep3
The Devil And The South China Sea. Tropical storms hit, and the torrential rain and lack of food brings a survivalist to breaking point. One team is stalked by territorial sharks. S4, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Return To Cap Centre. The team are back at the Capital Centre. They salvage from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, bringing back shoji screens and bullet-proof plexiglass. S10, Ep13
Jamestown Moose Lodge. The crew accept an invitation to salvage a 100-year-old lodge in Jamestown, New York. They collect unique stair spindles and beautiful stained glass. S11, Ep1
Golden Dreams. While Derek finds out what the best dredge in Alaska can do, Vernon plans to steal a boat from an old enemy. Emily's new diver gets his first time under the water. S5, Ep9
Father's Day. While Shawn looks to give his dad a golden gift for the inland mining operation, Kris gives father Brad a very 'Kelly' present to celebrate the special day. S5, Ep10
The Scrappers launch their season determined to find a huge gold haul. Meanwhile, new crew the Victoria Diggers may have stumbled on a million-dollar motherlode. S4, Ep2
It Comes In The Night. Forrest searches for a bull elephant that has been destroying local villages. The investigation leads to one of his biggest animal rescues. S1, Ep1
The Darkened Sea. The Time Bandit and Cornelia Marie are hauling in huge crab numbers. But Captain Phil's good mood is severely dented when his son reveals a terrible secret. S6, Ep10
Blown Off Course. Crisis hits the Cornelia Marie as the skipper becomes ill. While on the Northwestern, Jake Anderson learns disturbing details about his father's disappearance. S6, Ep11
A Cursed Fortune. The team finds more artefacts leading them closer to treasure, and meets a local historian who gives them a valuable clue, but warns of the fortune's cursed past. S2, Ep2
Captain Kidd's Treasure. Josh travels to the Caribbean to hunt for the legendary treasure of Captain Kidd. The search takes him to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer. S3, Ep10
Blackbeard's Hidden Gold. Josh Gates explores the ocean floor of the Cayman Islands and the coasts of North Carolina to find the lost treasure of the legendary pirate, Blackbeard. S2, Ep4
Shock And Awe. Marty embarks on an ambitious, off-grid hydropower system following a storm. Matt creates a meat smoker, but a surprise accident leads to a construction site injury. S2, Ep5
Killzone. Marty helps Oregon homesteaders build a barn, Misty creates her first-ever subterranean garden, and Matt finds a humane approach to a mysterious predator threat. S2, Ep6
The Bishop hires a bomb expert to blast the impenetrable rock that's blocking access to a rich opal seam. Meanwhile, the Misfits face avalanches and dust storms. S5, Ep10
The Mooka Boys risk being buried alive as they hunt for a legendary mine shaft. The Blacklighters are overwhelmed by choking dust on their bone-dry claim. S5, Ep11
Settling The Score. Winter kicks into high gear on the Bering Sea. While an unruly deckhand forces captain Sean Dwyer to enforce his dad's law, Keith struggles with new greenhorns. S12, Ep12
For a crab fisherman, violent storms, huge waves, and long stretches of hard labour are part of the job. Meet the men who made it through their training - and those that didn't.
Little House On The Line. The crew takes on a modular build to help a dad who needs more space for himself and his daughters. And Ashely has the crew crawling up the walls. S15, Ep4
Bricks And Beams. Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders crew build a beautiful, two-story log cabin addition for an old brick home in Lexington, Virginia. S15, Ep4
A disastrous fire could ruin the Gold Timers' season before it has even begun. The Ferals are forced to launch a rescue mission when Rob goes missing. S7, Ep3
Belly Of The Beast. Extraction is on the other side of the island, but the sea is risky to cross. If they trek through the jungle, they might meet poisonous vipers and centipedes. S4, Ep5
No Hand-Outs. Tensions start to rise between teams as they get territorial over hunting ground. Plus, one survivalist is bitten by a snake and requires urgent medical attention. S4, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Return To Jamestown, NY. The crew return to Jamestown to hunt for items at a home that's been expanded to create a Moose Lodge. They uncover neon lights and ornate roofing tiles. S11, Ep2
North Carolina Pick And Haul. In North Carolina, the crew search for items at a Mediterranean-style mansion. They salvage stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers. S11, Ep3
Rock Bottom. Approaching the midpoint of the season, it's sink or swim for the Nome dredging fleet. Meanwhile, Shawn is hoping for an unlikely partnership with Zeke. S5, Ep11
Breaking Point. A lack of gold has everyone on edge and Steve's refusal to let Shawn go to Bluff causes war between father and son. Plus, Emily gets news that could end her season. S5, Ep12
One team breaks all records, unearthing the biggest gold nugget ever found on television. Neville and Mick are hampered by a run-in with one of the deadliest snakes on the planet. S4, Ep3
Croc Witchcraft. Forrest heads to Africa's Zambezi River, where crocodile attacks plague a village. He teams up with an old friend to stop the killings and save the croc. S1, Ep2
Empty Throne. Skipper Phil Harris is airlifted to hospital in Anchorage and his son Josh is torn between catching the rest of their crab quota and his father's bedside. S6, Ep12
Cain And Abel. The fleet is beset by crisis. Skipper Phil fights for his life as his sons fight each other, and sick of false promises, Captain Sig's brother thinks of quitting. S6, Ep13
Treasure Found! The team finds proof of treasure in the jungle near a historic mission. A spooky visit to an antique market uncovers Jesuit silver, leading them up a perilous river. S2, Ep3
Finding Fenn's Fortune. Josh joins the hunt for a $2-million treasure. He tries to decode the clues to its location by following a cryptic poem, leading him into the Rocky Mountains. S2, Ep5
Genghis Khan's Tomb. Josh Gates journeys into the heart of Mongolia in search of the fabled lost tomb of Genghis Khan. He examines historical evidence, facts and myths. S2, Ep6
Fury And Fire. Threatened by an approaching wildfire, Stuart and Toni Rinker need a solution to their failing Idaho homestead. But, Stuart opposes the Raneys' fire-proofing plans. S2, Ep7
Line Of Fire. A homestead in danger of a raging California wildfire prompts Marty to clear cut surrounding trees and create an evacuation ark for the Grants' livestock. S2, Ep8
Scotty gets lost while exploring hidden tunnels on the Bishop's massive claim. Jack and Mickey are nearly crushed as the Tarantos try to move their machinery. S5, Ep12
The Bushmen attempt drilling for the first time with a 50-year-old exploration rig. Plus, the Mooka Boys go on a treasure hunt in a scorpion-riddled mine. S5, Ep13
Fire At Sea: Part 1. Alone on the water, days from land, the Northwestern catches fire. On the Time Bandit, a family emergency forces Johnathan to make a desperate move. S12, Ep13
Fire At Sea: Part 2. Alone on the water, days from land, the Northwestern catches fire. On the Time Bandit, a family emergency forces Johnathan to make a desperate move. S12, Ep14
The Beast Of Bray Road. Josh, Jess and Phil are looking for a werewolf-like creature in Wisconsin. Eyewitness accounts have led them on their quest to a remote forest. S2, Ep10
The Secret. Adventurer and avid explorer, Josh Gates, travels all over America to investigate the mystery of the 1980s bestseller and cult phenomenon, The Secret. S4, Ep1
